message:
feat(abi-tests): expand 6 low-coverage test files (+33 tests)

- pthread_rwlock_core: 3→9 (concurrent readers, null checks, reinit, double writer blocking)
- pthread_once: 4→8 (independent controls, idempotent, side effects, 16-thread stress)
- pthread_mutex_core: 5→13 (null checks for all ops, trylock unlocked, reinit, repeated lock/unlock)
- pthread_cond_core: 7→13 (null checks, signal wakes timedwait, reinit)
- stdlib_ext: 6→10 (version stability, confstr edge cases)
- string_ext: 11→16 (rawmemchr edges, strverscmp empty/prefix)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
